title: viguiera woronowii
intro: Viguiera woronowii, also known as 'Yellow Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viguiera woronowii include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Viguiera woronowii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
